1693390.name: XOMBEE MPFPS
1693390.description:
XOMBEE MPFPS is a Solo Project made using Unreal Engine 4.26 It is a FPS played Solo or Multiplayer with 3rdPerson view added in .
The Game is Mutant vs Humans with 7 Unique Levels to play .
Maps included are : Conquest , Rush , Vehicle , Team Death Match , Death Match , Capture the Flag , Kill Confirmed
4 Character Classes - Assault , Medic , Support , Scout
Some of the Perks included are - Jet Pack , Med Bot , Speed Boost , Mine
8 Different Soldiers on 2 Teams
Alpha Team includes 1-Robot Girl and 3-Male Tech Soldiers
Beta Team includes 4 - Mutants
1693390.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
